factors.summary: The company is facing significant margin pressure due to rising fuel costs, which are driven by higher oil prices and refining margins. While the company is managing fuel costs through effective hedging strategies, such as using call options to cap crude oil costs, labor costs and wage inflation may also contribute to margin pressure.

evidence.text: Aircraft fuel expense increased $285 million, or 50%, compared to the nine months ended September 30, 2020.
Raw fuel expense per gallon increased by approximately 70% due to higher West Coast jet fuel prices, driven by a 70% increase in crude oil prices and a 170% increase in refining margins.

All of our future oil positions are call options, which are designed to effectively cap the cost of the crude oil component of our jet fuel purchases. With call options, we are hedged against volatile crude oil price increases.
We are not currently required to maintain any reserve under these agreements, but if we were, our financial position and liquidity could be materially harmed.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: The company is facing significant margin pressure due to rising fuel costs, which are driven by higher oil prices and refining margins.

factors.summary: The company is enhancing its capacity utilization across multiple fronts, including increased demand, expanded operations, and strategic fleet management. The evidence highlights improvements in traffic, aircraft utilization, and operational efficiency, all pointing to a positive trend in capacity utilization.

evidence.text: Higher Mainline revenues are primarily attributable to a 71% increase in traffic on a 41-point increase in capacity, driven by the significant increase in demand recovering from the COVID-19 pandemic.
The anticipated fleet count by year reflects intended early retirement and extensions or replacement of certain leases, not all of which have been contracted yet.
Aircraft utilization increased by 39.7% year-over-year, and RPMs and ASMs grew significantly, reflecting improved capacity utilization.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Increased traffic and utilization point to strong operational efficiency improvements.

factors.summary: The company is deleveraging, with a significant improvement in its debt-to-capitalization ratio from 61% to 51% over the past year. This trend reflects efforts to strengthen the balance sheet and reduce financial risk.

evidence.text: Decreased debt-to-capitalization ratio to 51% at September 30, 2021 from 61% at December 31, 2020;
Efforts taken throughout 2021 have resulted in lowering our debt-to-capitalization ratio to 51%, a 10-point improvement from December 31, 2020.

For federal income tax purposes, the majority of our assets are fully depreciated over a seven-year life using an accelerated depreciation method or bonus depreciation, if available. For financial reporting purposes, the majority of our assets are depreciated over 15 to 25 years to an estimated salvage value using the straight-line basis. This difference has created a significant deferred tax liability.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Significant reduction in debt-to-capitalization ratio shows strong balance sheet management.

factors.summary: Free cash flow generation is improving, supported by positive operating cash flow and reduced capital expenditures, as well as revenue growth and cost control. However, cash used in investing activities has increased slightly compared to the previous year.

evidence.text: Generated positive operating cash flow of $901 million, bolstered by improved advance bookings for increased demand for air travel, and the receipt of $1.2 billion in payroll support funding from the U.S. Treasury under extensions of CARES Act programs, $892 million of which is included in operating cash flow;
Cash used in investing activities was $943 million during the first nine months of 2021, compared to $767 million during the same period of 2020.
The text does not provide specific figures on free cash flow, but improved profitability suggests positive cash flow trends.

sentiment.label: positive
